name: Stealth: Crunchyroll anime browse
goal:
Navigate to the anime browsing section and list 5 popular or featured anime titles currently shown on the homepage or browse page.
Only use https://www.crunchyroll.com to achieve the task.

name: Stealth: Best Buy deals page
goal:
Navigate to the deals or top deals page and extract the name and discounted price of the first 3 deals listed.
Only use https://www.bestbuy.com to achieve the task.

name: Stealth: Target product browse
goal:
Navigate to the Electronics section and list 3 featured or promoted products currently shown.
Only use https://www.target.com to achieve the task.

name: Stealth: John Lewis commerce search
goal:
Use the product search function to look up "organic cotton towels" and extract the name and price of the top search result.
Only use https://www.johnlewis.com to achieve the task.

name: Stealth: APKPure app search
goal:
Use the site search to find "WhatsApp" and extract the latest version number and download count shown for the top result.
Only use https://apkpure.com to achieve the task.

name: BBC Live news navigation
goal:
Navigate to the Live section and give me the first topic that has "Trump" in it.
Only use https://www.bbc.com/ to achieve the task.

name: Scribd ebook search
goal:
Search for a free ebook on "Healthy Cooking" and list the title and author of the first result including its URL on the site.
Only use https://www.scribd.com/ to achieve the task.

name: NIH medical search
goal:
Use the site's search feature to find information on "Alzheimer's disease" and extract the title and publication date of the first related press release.
Only use https://www.nih.gov/ to achieve the task.

name: Yale university navigation
goal:
Navigate to the "About Yale" section and summarize Yale University's mission statement in your own words.
Only use https://www.yale.edu/ to achieve the task.

name: Goal.com Champions League analysis
goal:
Find the match analysis of the last Champions League game and write down the main conclusions.
Only use https://www.goal.com/en-us/ to achieve the task.
